data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 3 advisory). Remediating: (1) the shape contract ENUMERATES the required keys per enrichment method (search_issues: each issue has key:str + fields:dict; get_comment_map: {key: {comments:list}}; get_issuelinks_map: {key: [{type:{name:str}, in/outwardIssue?}]}; get_parent_map: {key: str|None}) — checked via shared assertion fns; (2) DROPPING the optional OpenAPI leg — the untracked epic open question is resolved as out-of-scope: the dual-run real-vs-fake shape comparison IS the verified-fake honesty mechanism (SWE-at-Google), OpenAPI is YAGNI for a single team. Dual-run: identical contract fns parametrized over the fake (always, hermetic) + the real AcliClient (live-gated by REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL + creds).
